title: Governed State Proposal
description: A proposal for a material change to governed state in this instance.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the proposal was created.

change_type.description: The nature of the proposed change.

target_surface.description: The governed-state file or directory being changed. Use a repo-relative path.

summary.description: One or two sentence summary of the proposed change.

rationale.description: Why this change should be made. What problem does it solve?

evidence_refs.description: References to supporting evidence (file paths, URLs, Supabase thought IDs).

proposed_diff_summary.description: Human-readable description of what would change.

confidence.description: Proposer's confidence that this change is correct (0.0–1.0).

proposer.description: Who or what created this proposal (e.g. 'claude-code', 'xavier', 'sync-agent').

reviewer.description: Who reviewed this proposal. Populated at review time.

decided_at.description: When the proposal was approved or rejected.

decision_notes.description: Notes from the reviewer explaining the decision.
